query:
SELECT 
  id,
  name,
  email,
  role,
  login_method,
  created_at,
  last_signed_in,
  onboarding_step,
  onboarding_completed_at,
  current_tool,
  current_tool_other,
  pain_points,
  pain_points_other,
  success_definition,
  willingness_to_pay,
  additional_notes
FROM users
WHERE created_at >= '2026-03-21 22:00:00'
  AND created_at <= '2026-03-22 02:00:00'
ORDER BY created_at ASC;
